rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Training platform = Claude Code (CLI + Desktop) + Cowork.
rules_evaluated.notes: AE101 is Claude Code only (CLI + Desktop, no Cowork per training-architecture.md). Module file contains no Cowork references, no claude.ai-only features.

Platform claims in body: /context shows window state (verified per rule 6); ccstatusline as continuous status-line tool (URL live, github.com/sirmalloc/ccstatusline); CLAUDE.local.md auto-loads (verified per rule 6d); team CLAUDE.md concatenates (verified per rule 6d). No unverified assertions.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Known correct Claude Code facts (easy to get wrong).
rules_evaluated.notes: '/context' used correctly. No plan-mode keybinding asserted in body. MCP connector mechanics deferred to reference/mcp-and-connectors.md rather than asserted inline — correct pattern (rule 4a).

Artefact contract row says CLAUDE.local.md 'auto-loads at session-cold start' — accurate per rule 6d. Next-section claim that CLAUDE.local.md + team ./CLAUDE.md 'both concatenate into context' is accurate. No false auto-load claims for arbitrary paths or .claude/<x>/ folders.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Sessions are the unit of work — 'start a new session,' not 'open Claude Code.'
rules_evaluated.notes: Body uses session-correct phrasing ('open the first session', 'Module 2 opens fresh', 'Close this session when the ticket lands'). No 'open Claude Code' conflation.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cross-cwd boundaries always open 'new'; evidence travels by disk.
rules_evaluated.notes: M1 operates inside one repo; no worktree forks or cross-cwd transitions. Artefact contract row identifies CLAUDE.local.md as consumed by future sessions in the same repo — correct.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source URL + type label — mandatory (scope: maintainer-block only, not student-facing body).
rules_evaluated.notes: Body-prose citations (Cherny line 54, ccstatusline line 41) are builder-voice — no label required per scope carve-out. Maintainer-block Frameworks-riffed-on entries carry correct [practitioner direct, vendor venue] labels on both Klaassen and Huryn. Klaassen has a live URL (every.to/source-code/compound-engineering-the-definitive-guide); Huryn URL deferred by design until M4 reveal (rationale logged in maintainer block).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Freshness rule — 6 months; older sources need explicit dating.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Cherny video (May 2025) sits ~12 months from today (2026-05-22). Exception explicitly logged in maintainer block: 'Freshness-rule exception — Cherny Mastering Claude Code in 30 minutes (May 2025). Kept outside the 6-month window by decision; pedagogy match unbeaten by successors.' Rule 2 permits dated-and-named exceptions. Acceptable.
rules_evaluated.notes: Klaassen Compound Engineering (every.to) was published 2026-02-09 per the page metadata (article:published_time) — within 6-month window. Huryn three-block memory: framework is cultural in the practitioner community; URL deferred.
No round-number AI failure/success statistics in body. No zombie-shape claims.

M1 does not build verification machinery (no hooks, judges, eval loops). N/A.
